questions.question_text: Saudi Arabia was historically 'synonymous' with oil production. What does 'synonymous' mean?

options.text: Completely different from and unrelated to something else
Strongly associated with and almost identical in meaning to something
Only occasionally linked to something in certain contexts
Independent from and having no connection to another thing

questions.explanation_ar: synonymous تعني مرادف أو مرتبط ارتباطاً وثيقاً بشيء آخر، أي أن الأمرين يُفكَّر فيهما معاً بشكل تلقائي.

questions.question_text: Saudi Arabia has 'committed' to generating 50% of electricity from renewables by 2030. What does 'committed' mean?

options.text: Suggested an informal idea without making any firm promises
Made a firm and binding promise to achieve a specific goal
Explored different possibilities without choosing a specific path
Completed a task successfully without any remaining obligations

questions.explanation_ar: committed تعني التزم ووعد بجدية، أي تقديم تعهد ملزم بتحقيق هدف محدد بغض النظر عن الصعوبات.

questions.question_text: NEOM could serve as a 'blueprint' for nations seeking to transition to clean energy. What does 'blueprint' mean?

options.text: A warning about the potential dangers of a new technology
A detailed model or plan that others can follow and copy
A financial investment made to support a promising project
A report that summarises the results of a completed project

questions.explanation_ar: blueprint تعني مخطط نموذجي أو خطة تفصيلية يمكن اتباعها كمرجع لتنفيذ مشاريع مماثلة.

questions.question_text: Wind turbines are 'harnessing' the Red Sea's coastal winds to produce clean energy. What does 'harnessing' mean?

options.text: Studying and measuring natural forces to understand them better
Capturing and using a natural resource to produce energy or power
Blocking and preventing natural forces from causing any damage
Storing natural resources in special facilities for future use

questions.explanation_ar: harnessing تعني يُوظّف ويستخدم موارد طبيعية، أي القدرة على استغلال قوة طبيعية كالريح أو الشمس لتحقيق غرض عملي.

questions.question_text: Saudi Arabia plans to 'transition' from oil-dependent to clean energy systems. What does 'transition' mean?

options.text: To abandon all previous systems suddenly and without any planning
To maintain two separate systems running side by side permanently
To move gradually from one state or system to a different one
To return to an older system after testing a newer approach

questions.explanation_ar: transition تعني التحوّل والانتقال التدريجي، أي الانتقال من نظام أو حالة إلى أخرى بطريقة منظّمة ومدروسة.

questions.question_text: When governments 'allocate' billions of dollars to solar projects, they assign specific funds for that purpose.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. allocate تعني يُخصّص ويُرصد، أي تخصيص موارد أو أموال لهدف أو مشروع محدد.

questions.question_text: When Saudi Arabia is said to be 'shifting' its energy paradigm, it means the country is keeping its energy policies exactly the same.
questions.explanation_ar: خطأ. shifting تعني يُحوّل ويُغيّر، أي إجراء تحوّل ملموس في الاتجاه والسياسة، وهو عكس الإبقاء على نفس النهج.

questions.question_text: Energy experts _____ that Saudi Arabia will rank among the world's top solar producers by 2025.
questions.explanation_ar: estimate تعني يُقدّر ويتوقع رقماً تقريبياً، أي الوصول إلى حكم كمي استناداً إلى البيانات المتاحة.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses the past passive correctly?

options.text: The solar farm built in the desert last year.
The solar farm was built in the desert last year.
The solar farm builded in the desert last year.
The solar farm were built in the desert last year.

questions.explanation_ar: المبني للمجهول في الماضي يُكوَّن بـ was/were + تصريف ثالث. الخيار b صحيح، والخيار d يخطئ بـ were مع مفرد.

questions.question_text: Complete: 'The first renewable energy law _____ by the Saudi government in 2013.'

options.text: passed
was passed
were passed
is passed

questions.explanation_ar: نستخدم was/were + تصريف ثالث في الماضي المبني للمجهول. 'law' مفرد يستلزم was، ونضيف passed وهو التصريف الثالث.

questions.question_text: Which sentence correctly uses 'were' in the past passive?

options.text: Thousands of solar panels was installed across the desert.
The new energy policy was approved by both engineers and officials.
Thousands of solar panels were installed across the desert.
The renewable targets were reached in just one year surprisingly.

questions.explanation_ar: 'Thousands of solar panels' جمع يستلزم were في المبني للمجهول الماضي. الخيار b صحيح أيضاً نحوياً لكن c يُطابق جمع الفاعل مع were.

questions.question_text: Why is past passive used in 'The NEOM project was announced in 2017'?

options.text: Because the action happened in the present, not the past
Because we want to focus on the project rather than who announced it
Because 'announced' cannot be used in the active voice
Because the subject 'project' is doing the action of announcing

questions.explanation_ar: نستخدم المبني للمجهول الماضي حين يكون التركيز على الشيء الذي حدث له الأمر (المشروع) وليس على مَن قام بالإعلان.

questions.question_text: 'Billions of dollars were invested in renewable energy projects across the Kingdom' uses the past passive correctly.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. were invested هي صيغة المبني للمجهول الصحيحة في الماضي (were + تصريف ثالث)، والجملة تُركّز على الاستثمار كحدث وليس على الجهة التي استثمرت.

questions.question_text: Match each active sentence to its correct past passive equivalent.

left_items: Engineers built the solar farm in 2020.
The government launched the Green Initiative.
Scientists developed a new heat-resistant coating.
right_items: A new heat-resistant coating was developed by scientists.
The solar farm was built in 2020.
The Green Initiative was launched by the government.

correct_answer.left: Engineers built the solar farm in 2020.
correct_answer.right: The solar farm was built in 2020.

correct_answer.left: The government launched the Green Initiative.
correct_answer.right: The Green Initiative was launched by the government.

correct_answer.left: Scientists developed a new heat-resistant coating.
correct_answer.right: A new heat-resistant coating was developed by scientists.

questions.explanation_ar: في تحويل الماضي للمبني للمجهول: المفعول يصبح فاعلاً، والفعل يُصبح was/were + تصريف ثالث، والفاعل الأصلي يُذكر بعد by أو يُحذف.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, where is the NEOM project located in Saudi Arabia?

options.text: In the eastern region near the Arabian Gulf
In the northwest region of Tabuk
In the central region near Riyadh
Along the southern coast near Jizan

questions.explanation_ar: حدّد النص أن مشروع نيوم يقع في منطقة تبوك شمال غرب المملكة العربية السعودية.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, how many homes will NEOM's clean energy production be enough to power?

options.text: 500,000 homes
1 million homes
1.5 million homes
2 million homes

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن مشروع نيوم سينتج طاقة نظيفة كافية لتشغيل 1.5 مليون منزل مع توفير آلاف فرص العمل لمهنيين سعوديين شباب.

questions.question_text: Passage A calls Saudi Arabia 'historically synonymous with oil production' but now describes it leading a renewable revolution. What does this contrast suggest?

options.text: Saudi Arabia has completely abandoned oil production and revenues
Saudi Arabia is transitioning its identity from a fossil fuel state to a clean energy leader
Renewable energy in Saudi Arabia has already fully replaced oil production
Oil was always less important to Saudi Arabia than other energy sources

questions.explanation_ar: يُبرز هذا التعارض تحوّلاً استراتيجياً جوهرياً في هوية المملكة، من دولة ارتبط اسمها بالنفط إلى رائدة في قطاع الطاقة النظيفة.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, Vision 2030 commits Saudi Arabia to generating 50% of its electricity from renewable sources by 2030.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. ذكر النص أن مبادرة رؤية 2030 تلتزم بتوليد 50% من الكهرباء من مصادر متجددة بحلول عام 2030.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, Vision 2030 targets generating _____ percent of Saudi electricity from renewable sources by 2030.
questions.explanation_ar: حدّد النص هدف رؤية 2030 بتوليد 50% من الكهرباء من مصادر الطاقة المتجددة بحلول عام 2030.

questions.question_text: Match each Saudi renewable energy institution or initiative from Passage A to its description.

right_items: allocated billions to construct solar farms across desert landscapes
futuristic city to be entirely powered by renewable energy
university with cutting-edge labs for solar cell research
national plan targeting 50% electricity from renewables by 2030

correct_answer.right: national plan targeting 50% electricity from renewables by 2030
futuristic city to be entirely powered by renewable energy
allocated billions to construct solar farms across desert landscapes
university with cutting-edge labs for solar cell research

questions.explanation_ar: وردت هذه الجهات الأربع في النص مع أدوارها: رؤية 2030 (الهدف الوطني)، نيوم (مدينة متجددة)، مبادرة سلمان (الاستثمارات)، وكاوست (الأبحاث).
